title: Bombay High Court "disturbed" by police inaction during midnight demolition of printing press founded by Dr. BR Ambedkar
description: The Bombay High Court condemned police inaction over midnight demolition of the historic Buddha Bhushan Printing Press founded by Dr. BR Ambedkar in Mumbai's Dadar [Prakash Ambedkar v. Vijay B Ranpise & Ors.]A division bench of Justices AS Gadkari and Kamal Khata directed the Mumbai Police Commissioner to personally respond to the alleged inaction.The order was passed on petitions concerning the June 2016 demolition of the printing press founded by Dr. BR Ambedkar in 1945. Dr. Babasaheb Ambe
